title: Attribute to force a signal to be used "as-is" (like if coming from a blackbox).

features.name: preserve_wire_definition
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment followed by a downstream wire that uses the first wire, where the first wire's definition should not be substituted into the downstream expression during optimization

features.name: blackbox_attribute_on_module
features.description: Code should include a module marked with (* blackbox *) attribute to indicate it should not be synthesized

features.name: keep_attribute_on_wire
features.description: Code should include a wire with the (* keep *) attribute applied, demonstrating that keep alone does not prevent source substitution during optimization

features.name: always_block_using_computed_wire
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block that uses a wire which is computed from other logic, where the wire's definition should not be substituted into the always block during optimization
